gleam 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Compute Meat Production Outputs

Source: R/production_cohort_core_model.R
compute_meat_outputs.Rd

Computes meat production outputs at the animal cohort level based on the number of animals removed from the herd during the assessment period. The function returns multiple meat production metrics, including total meat production expressed in live weight, carcass weight, boneless meat, and meat protein. All outputs are expressed in kg per cohort per assessment period.

compute_meat_outputs(
  offtake_number_assessment,
  slaughter_weight,
  carcass_dressing_percentage,
  bone_free_meat_fraction,
  meat_protein
)

Arguments

offtake_number_assessment

Numeric. Total number of animals removed via offtake over the assessment period, aggregated to 6 sex–age cohorts: adult females (FA), sub-adult females (FS), juvenile females (FJ), adult males (MA), sub-adult males (MS), and juvenile males (MJ) (heads/year).

slaughter_weight

Numeric. Live weight at slaughter for animals removed from the cohort (kg).

carcass_dressing_percentage

Numeric. Ratio of a slaughtered animal's carcass weight to its live weight (fraction).

bone_free_meat_fraction

Numeric. Ratio of bone-free-meat to carcass weight (fraction).

meat_protein

Numeric. Protein content of bone-free-meat (kg protein/kg bone-free-meat).

Value

Named list containing:

output_meat_production_liveweight

Numeric. Total meat produced as live weight over the assessment period by cohort (kg/cohort/assessment period).

output_meat_production_carcassweight

Numeric. Total meat as carcass weight (excluding organs, and other by-products after dressing) produced over the assessment period by cohort (kg/cohort/assessment period).

output_meat_production_meat

Numeric. Total bone-free-meat (excluding bones, organs, and other by-products after dressing and bone removal) produced over the assessment period by cohort (kg/cohort/assessment period)

output_meat_production_protein

Numeric. Total meat protein (excluding bones, organs, and other by-products after dressing and bone removal) produced over the assessment period by cohort (kg protein/cohort/assessment period).

Cohorts with no offtake during the assessment period should return zero outputs through upstream parameterisation (e.g. offtake_number = 0).

Contents

Developed by Ahmed Jou, Yassine Elaouni, Dominik Wisser, Lydia Lanzoni, Giuseppe Tempio, Federal Ministry of Agriculture, Food and Regional Identity of Germany BMELH.

Site built with pkgdown 2.1.3.
